name: Mrs. Johnson's Peach Preserves
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, dissolve the sugar in water over medium-high heat and bring to a boil; cook for about 5 minutes, or until syrup is clear. Skim off any froth.
2. Add vanilla and lemon extract, stir in the peaches, and return to a boil. Cook carefully to prevent boiling over.
3. Boil for an additional 5 minutes. Remove from heat and skim off any remaining froth.
4. Fill hot, sterilized jars (quart-size screw-top Mason jars) and adjust caps; a suction seal will form as they cool. Store in a cool, dark place. Serve with hot biscuits or warm over vanilla or Texas peach ice cream.
Makes 3 quarts.
